settings.title: Sunrise Yoga Studio
settings.tagline: Find your flow in Portland, OR
settings.description: Sunrise Yoga Studio in Portland, OR. Classes for all levels: vinyasa flow, yin & restorative, hot yoga, and community classes. Join our welcoming studio community.

content.headline: Your practice starts here
content.subheadline: Sunrise Yoga Studio in Portland, OR offers yoga for every body. Whether you're stepping onto the mat for the first time or deepening a lifelong practice, our classes meet you exactly where you are.

content.headline: Classes for every body
content.subheadline: Six styles of practice, expert instructors, and a welcoming community that celebrates where you are today.

features.title: Vinyasa Flow
features.description: Dynamic, breath-linked movement that builds strength, flexibility, and focus. Mon/Wed/Fri at 7 AM with Elena. All levels welcome.

features.title: Yin & Restorative
features.description: Slow, deep stretches held for minutes at a time. Perfect for recovery, stress relief, and finding stillness. Tue/Thu at 6 PM with Marcus.

features.title: Hot Yoga
features.description: Practice in a heated room to deepen stretches, detoxify, and build endurance. Mon/Wed/Fri at noon with Jasmine. Bring water and a towel.

features.title: Community Classes
features.description: Weekly donation-based classes open to everyone. Saturday mornings at 10 AM. Yoga is for every body, every budget.

features.title: Private Sessions
features.description: One-on-one instruction tailored to your goals. Injury recovery, prenatal yoga, or personal deepening. $75 per hour.

features.title: Workshops & Retreats
features.description: Weekend workshops and seasonal retreats to deepen your practice and connect with our community. Members get 10-20% off.

testimonials.quote: Sunrise Yoga changed my relationship with my body. Elena's vinyasa flow is challenging but never intimidating. The instructors genuinely care about every student.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: I came for the hot yoga and stayed for the community. This studio feels like home. The Saturday community class is the highlight of my week.
testimonials.author: David L.

testimonials.quote: As a complete beginner, I was nervous walking in. By the end of my first yin class with Marcus, I was hooked. The atmosphere here is pure warmth.
testimonials.author: Priya K.

items.question: Do I need experience to attend?
items.answer: Not at all. Every class offers modifications for all levels. Our instructors will help you find your edge without pushing past it. We recommend starting with Vinyasa Flow or Yin & Restorative.

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: Just yourself and a water bottle. We provide mats, blocks, straps, and blankets at no extra charge. For hot yoga, bring a towel or rent one from the front desk for $2.

items.question: How much does a class cost?
items.answer: Drop-in classes are $20. Monthly Unlimited is $99/month with access to all classes. Annual Unlimited is $899/year and saves you $289. Your first class is always free.

items.question: What's your cancellation policy?
items.answer: Cancel or reschedule your registration up to 2 hours before class at no charge. Late cancellations count as attended for drop-in passes. Monthly and Annual members have unlimited access with no penalties.

items.question: What should I expect on my first visit?
items.answer: Arrive 10 minutes early to check in and settle in. Wear comfortable clothes you can move in. Our front desk team will show you around and help you get set up. No judgment, no pressure — just breathe.

items.question: Is there parking available?
items.answer: Yes. Free street parking is available on SE Hawthorne and surrounding blocks. The studio is also accessible by TriMet bus lines 14 and 75, and there's a bike rack right outside.

content.headline: Class Schedule
content.subheadline: Browse our weekly classes and register for your next session. All classes include mats and props. First class is always free.

content.headline: Simple, flexible pricing
content.subheadline: Whether you drop in once a week or practice daily, we have a plan that fits. Your first class is always free.

plans.name: Drop-In
plans.description: Pay per class. No commitment required.

items.question: Is there a first class free offer?
items.answer: Yes! Your first class at Sunrise Yoga is always free, regardless of class type. Just register online or walk in. No credit card required.

items.question: Can I pause or cancel my membership?
items.answer: Monthly memberships can be paused for up to 30 days or cancelled anytime — no penalties, no questions. Annual memberships can be paused but are non-refundable after the first 30 days.

items.question: Do you offer student or senior discounts?
items.answer: Yes. Students and seniors (65+) receive 15% off all membership plans. Show a valid student ID or mention it at sign-up.

items.question: What about private sessions?
items.answer: Private one-on-one sessions are $75/hour and can be customized to your goals — injury recovery, prenatal prep, or deepening your practice. Book via our contact form or call the studio.

items.question: Do members skip the per-class fee?
items.answer: Yes. Monthly and Annual Unlimited members have free access to all scheduled group classes. No per-class charge, no registration fees. Just show up and practice.

content.headline: Visit the studio
content.subheadline: Questions about classes, memberships, or your first visit? We'd love to hear from you. Drop by, call, or send us a message — we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
